title: Employ Sync
description: Employee management app built with React and Tailwind CSS. Uses Context API for centralized state and LocalStorage for persistent, role-based task management.

title: NeuWrap
description: A premium web experience using React and GSAP with seamless scroll animations, responsive Tailwind CSS layouts, and a performance-first UI.

title: Action Hub
description: All-in-one productivity dashboard with customizable themes, goal tracking, motivational quotes, personalized tasks, pomodoro timers, and weather updates.
